error_signature: 400 Bad request - please check your parameters
title: WhatsApp Template sends 400 Bad Request error
symptom: When attempting to send a message using a WhatsApp template, n8n returns a 400 error indicating a bad request due to parameter issues.
not_this_if: Error occurs with other types of messages or templates
root_cause: The WhatsApp API requires parameters to be formatted in a specific way. If named parameters are used instead of positional parameters, or if the number of parameters does not match the template's requirements, a 400 error will occur.
fix_steps: Open the WhatsApp template settings in your workflow
Change named parameters in the body text to positional parameters
Ensure the number of strings matches the number of parameters in the template
Save the workflow and try sending the message again
agent_instruction: Switch to positional parameters in the WhatsApp template body text and ensure they match the template's requirements.
